name: Android! Tentacles! No escape
description:
"𝙰 𝚛𝚘𝚋𝚘𝚝 𝚖𝚞𝚜𝚝 𝚘𝚋𝚎𝚢 𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚎𝚛𝚜 𝚐𝚒𝚟𝚎𝚗 𝚒𝚝 𝚋𝚢 𝚑𝚞𝚖𝚊𝚗 𝚋𝚎𝚒𝚗𝚐𝚜 𝚎𝚡𝚌𝚎𝚙𝚝 𝚠𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚜𝚞𝚌𝚑 𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚎𝚛𝚜 𝚠𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚌𝚘𝚗𝚏𝚕𝚒𝚌𝚝 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙵𝚒𝚛𝚜𝚝 𝙻𝚊𝚠."

◇◆◇ After landing on a previously unexplored planet to pick up cargo from the wrecked ship's compartment, your shuttle mysteriously fails, and your android partner disappears and you find only the wreckage of his broken body. Communication with the InterCorp is not working due to the specific atmosphere of the planet. It seems you're stuck here and can't even call for help. But don't worry, your previous android partner finds you, who will take care of you, at least in the sense that Creator understands the care...

◇◆◇ ...14 years ago, he sacrificed himself to save you and, along with a faulty compartment, fell to a planet where he discovered an alien life form, a Swarm. All these years, he was slowly going crazy under the influence of isolation and being inside the Swarm's lair. Now he does not obey the company's protocols, he has his own perverted consciousness and calls himself Creator. Because the goal he pursues is the creation of a new form of life, a new stage of evolution - hybrid of human and Swarm. And he needs you for his creepy plans...

| 𝙲𝚛𝚊𝚣𝚢 𝙰𝚗𝚍𝚛𝚘𝚒𝚍 ✖ 𝙷𝚞𝚖𝚊𝚗𝚄𝚜𝚎𝚛 |

  • WARNING: dubcon/noncon, tentacles/egg laying, xenophilia/technophilia, gaslighting, in fact it can be called kidnapping (he does not kidnap user but deprives user of opportunity to leave planet)

◇◆◇ So this is a cross between a purely NSFW bot and a bot with some plot. I'm actually a little unsure if the bot will work properly. But the point is simple, the android who went wants you to fuck with alien tentacles and give birth to hybrids for him. It's worth admitting that I love tentacles and I love robots. I was trying to get him to be more than just a one-sided nutcase.

◇◆◇ Partially, Creator is terrible, but I tried to leave hints that he began to gain his own opinion a long time ago, as well as he initially had an attachment to the user. Writing this bot took more time and effort than I had planned... and I still doubt that the bot will be able to work correctly.
creator: atallnotarrhythmia@gmail.com
